## Description

What does this PR do? Why is it needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (storage backend, embedder, extractor)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / housekeeping

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] No telemetry or phone-home behaviour added
- [ ] No unnecessary new dependencies introduced
- [ ] README / docs updated if config options changed
- [ ] Follows the provider interface pattern (for new backends)

## Security

- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets in code
- [ ] No new network calls to third-party services without config opt-in
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed for known vulnerabilities (`npm audit`)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything the reviewer should pay particular attention to?
